content: Planned action: inspect the current session store and main_window wiring, then implement lazy session restore so Nino keeps URLs/estate between restarts without reloading all heavy tabs immediately at launch.

Planned action: inspect the current top-matrix widget and stable focus/split routing, then implement per-tile split memory so each tile restores its own right-hand partner, and extend the 1-36 top buttons to show paired split icons/visual state and jump back to that stored split when either member is clicked.

Planned action: reload shared brain priority files and Rob personal memory, inspect current family state plus third-eye, then prepare the exact first launch step for MonDeuxiemeProjet before any repository creation or distribution action.
